text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I notice Oguri Cap scuffling about
with a dejected look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Argh… Why? Why did I do that?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...This morning, I dreamed I had an unlimited
supply of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Just as I was relishing the sheer joy, swimming
through that mountain of orange...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I woke up. I wasn't ready to say goodbye. And
yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even during training, Oguri Cap fails to shake out
of her slump.
